{"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-704", "name": "Incorrect Type Conversion or Cast"}], "description": "`DiscoverKeys` in `pkg/apk/apk/implementation.go` unconditionally type-asserts JWKS keys as `*rsa.PublicKey` without checking the key type. If a repository JWKS endpoint returns a non-RSA key (e.g. EC), the unchecked assertion panics and crashes apko. This affects any workflow that initializes the APK database and fetches repository keys. Affected versions <= 0.30.34.

**Fix:** No fix available yet.

**Acknowledgements**

apko thanks Oleh Konko from [1seal](https://1seal.org/) for discovering and reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00252, "percentile": 0.165}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m7hm-vm4x-28jf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T21:25:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m7hm-vm4x-28jf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m7hm-vm4x-28jf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42576"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-09T20:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-05-04T21:25:30Z", "references": ["https://github.com/chainguard-dev/apko/security/advisories/GHSA-m7hm-vm4x-28jf", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42576", "https://github.com/chainguard-dev/apko/commit/6604826b19e36e9bc6e196592800fad93738f4a1", "https://github.com/chainguard-dev/apko/releases/tag/v1.2.7", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m7hm-vm4x-28jf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/chainguard-dev/apko/security-advisories/GHSA-m7hm-vm4x-28jf", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/chainguard-dev/apko", "summary": "apko `DiscoverKeys` has a panic on non-rsa jwks key that causes crash during key discovery", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T13:42:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m7hm-vm4x-28jf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.2.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "chainguard.dev/apko"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.2.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: apko `DiscoverKeys` has a panic on non-rsa jwks key that causes crash during key discovery
